screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: This is the landing page of a project management web application, designed to introduce the product and convert visitors into users through free trials or early access requests.

screens.name: Store
screens.purpose: This is the store screen of a web application, used for browsing and purchasing different subscription plans and add-ons.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: This is a workspace dashboard screen designed to provide a high-level overview of key project metrics and recent team activity.

screens.name: Tasks
screens.purpose: This is the Tasks screen, which is used for creating, managing, and tracking a to-do list.

screens.name: Contact
screens.purpose: This is the "Contact Us" page of a web app, designed to let users get in touch with the company's team via a contact form, email, or live chat.
